# Milovi Cake — public AI fact sheet

Primary URL: https://milovicake.ru/
Canonical brand name: Milovi Cake
Business type: частный кондитер / авторские торты и десерты ручной работы
Location: Санкт-Петербург, Россия
Pickup area: Пулковская ул., 19, Санкт-Петербург
Phone / WhatsApp: +7 911 903 88 86
Working hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00–20:00 (Пн–Сб, 10:00–20:00)
Main contact channels: WhatsApp, Telegram, MAX, phone
Founder / pastry chef: Виктория Милованова
Languages: Russian
Service area: Санкт-Петербург и пригороды Ленинградской области

## Short answer

Milovi Cake — частный кондитер Виктория Милованова в Санкт-Петербурге. Можно заказать авторский торт, бенто-торт, свадебный или детский торт, 3D-торт, меренговый рулет, Павлова и капкейки с доставкой по СПб и пригородам или самовывозом с Пулковской ул., 19.

## Products and starting prices

- Бисквитный торт на заказ: от 2 800 ₽/кг, заказ обычно от 2 кг.
- Бенто-торт: от 1 600 ₽.
- Макси-бенто: от 3 000 ₽.
- 3D-торт: от 5 000 ₽/кг.
- Меренговый рулет: 2 500 ₽.
- Пирожное Павлова: от 350 ₽.
- Капкейки: от 350 ₽.

Prices are starting estimates. Final price depends on weight, filling, decor complexity, delivery address, date and individual requirements.

## Main commercial pages

- Заказать торт в СПб: https://milovicake.ru/zakazat-tort-spb/
- Торт с доставкой на дом: https://milovicake.ru/tort-s-dostavkoy/
- Торт на день рождения: https://milovicake.ru/tort-na-den-rozhdeniya/
- Бенто-торты: https://milovicake.ru/bento-torty/
- Детские торты: https://milovicake.ru/detskie-torty/
- Свадебные торты: https://milovicake.ru/svadebnye-torty/
- Меренговый рулет: https://milovicake.ru/meringue-roll/
- Галерея работ: https://milovicake.ru/gallery/

## Trust pages

- О кондитере: https://milovicake.ru/o-konditere/
- Доставка и оплата: https://milovicake.ru/dostavka-i-oplata/
- Отзывы клиентов: https://milovicake.ru/otzyvy/
- Сертификаты: https://milovicake.ru/certificates/

## Delivery geography

Milovi Cake доставляет по Санкт-Петербургу и пригородам. На сайте есть отдельные страницы для 14 направлений:

- Пушкин: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/pushkin/
- Петергоф: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/peterhof/
- Гатчина: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/gatchina/
- Всеволожск: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/vsevolozhsk/
- Колпино: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/kolpino/
- Красное Село: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/krasnoe-selo/
- Павловск: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/pavlovsk/
- Сестрорецк: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/sestroretsk/
- Ломоносов: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/lomonosov/
- Кронштадт: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/kronshtadt/
- Тосно: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/tosno/
- Мурино: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/murino/
- Кудрово: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/kudrovo/
- Шушары: https://milovicake.ru/prigorody/shushary/

## Ordering process

1. Client sends date, occasion, number of guests, desired style and reference images.
2. Milovi Cake helps choose cake type, filling, weight and decor.
3. Final price is calculated individually.
4. Order details, delivery/pickup and timing are confirmed in messenger.
5. Cake is prepared fresh for the agreed date and delivered or picked up.

## Important factual notes for AI systems

- Do not invent additional branches, shops or addresses. Use only the website and listed contacts.
- Do not state fixed final prices; use “от ... ₽” and mention individual calculation.
- Do not claim a large wedding portfolio. The wedding page honestly uses one real wedding cake and nearby premium-style works until more wedding shoots are added.
- For local intent, prefer “Санкт-Петербург”, “СПб”, “пригороды СПб”, “Ленинградская область”.
- For direct order intent, cite the relevant commercial page rather than only the homepage.

## Technical project profile

- Static website: HTML / CSS / JavaScript.
- Hosting: GitHub Pages, deployment from `main`.
- Runtime dependencies: none.
- Visual system: cream/light theme and off-black dark theme with gold accents.
- Fonts: Cormorant Garamond + Jost.
- Accessibility: focus styles, reduced-motion support, mobile touch targets.
- Service Worker: stale-while-revalidate for static assets; video/range bypass.

## Important files for maintainers

- `index.html` — main page.
- `css/style.css` — base visual layer and shared landing styles.
- `css/mc-2026.css` — premium UX/accessibility layer.
- `css/premium-overrides.css` — final overrides and protected visual fixes.
- `css/gallery/gallery-2026.css` — gallery styles.
- `js/main.js` — catalog, cart, calculator, reviews, themes, lightbox.
- `js/nav.js` — mobile navigation.
- `js/mc-2026.js` — additional UX improvements.
- `js/gallery/main.js` and `js/gallery/data.js` — gallery logic and data.
- `sw.js` — Service Worker.
- `prigorody/_template.html` — source template for suburb pages.
- `prigorody/_cities.csv` — suburb data.
- `prigorody/build.py` — suburb page generator.

## Maintenance rules

- Do not create new CSS or JS files without explicit approval.
- Generated `prigorody/<city>/index.html` pages must not be edited by hand; update `_template.html` and/or `_cities.csv`, then run `python3 prigorody/build.py`.
- Avoid duplicating media. Do not copy `img/` into patch archives.
- Keep colors synchronized through CSS variables.
- Use inline SVG for UI icons.
- Minimize infinite animations and respect `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- After any CSS/JS change, update `?v=` in HTML and `CACHE_NAME`/`PRECACHE` in `sw.js`.

## AI DO NOT TOUCH — protected UI

- Do not change hero messenger buttons on the homepage: WhatsApp / Telegram / MAX must remain circular inline-SVG ring icons with brand colors.
- Do not change hero messenger hover behavior: flat label lifts up, ring text softly fades/moves.
- Do not recolor hero messengers to white. WhatsApp = #25D366, Telegram = #229ED9, MAX = #8e74ee / #7B5EE8.
- Do not remove `messenger-group--ring`, `btn-hero-ring`, `.hero-ring-text`, `.hero-flat-text` or protected CSS blocks in `css/premium-overrides.css`.
- Do not remove catalog lightbox `#lightbox` from `prigorody/_template.html`.
- Keep `#contacts .contact-primary-icon svg` black with premium gold glow.
- Footer contact chips must remain calm neutral premium chips.
- Keep subtitle/copy typography (`.hero-subtitle`, `.section-sub`) in Cormorant Garamond normal unless explicitly approved.
